narrative.headline: What 2015 Kia Rio owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 52 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (44% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNED A 2015 KIA RIO. WHILE DRIVING 35 MPH, THE ENGINE LOST POWER. THE ACCELERATOR PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED, BUT THE VEHICLE FAILED TO ACCELERATE. THE CONTACT NOTICED SMOKE AND FIRE COMING FROM THE ENGINE COMPARTMENT OF THE VEHICLE. IN ADDITION, THE BRAKE PEDAL WAS DEP
